This satisfies the task to show the list of external hard drives for Mac with capacity >2TB on Micro Center sorted low to high.

action_history: Opening Micro Center: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.microcenter.com/');
Searching Micro Center: await page.locator('e6').fill('external hard drive mac');
Searching external hard drives: await page.locator('e6').fill('external hard drive');
Searching external hard drives: await page.locator('e7').click();
Selecting external hard drives category: await page.locator('e55').click();
